description_long: This bungalow features a modern, geometric design with clean lines and a flat, tiered roof structure. The building sits on a large, rectangular platform with a wide, tiled terrace surrounding the main structure. The front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns, and large windows are distributed across all visible sides, allowing for ample natural light. A prominent staircase is visible on one side, leading to the upper tier of the roof, which may serve as a terrace or additional living space. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, giving the bungalow a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The overall layout is spacious, with a focus on open, accessible outdoor areas and a strong horizontal emphasis.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a tiered structure, wide terrace, and large windows, finished in light colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch and large windows beneath the flat, tiered roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide terrace, central staircase, and the upper roof tier, with a prominent entry stairway.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the staircase to the upper roof, side windows, and a small exterior structure on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing symmetrical window placement and the clean, horizontal lines of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on all sides
